description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe  sandalsfrom  enroute. Pair it with any kind of western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways.This pair comes with a  shoe  bag to help you carry it around in ease.UpperLeather ankle straps with a buckle and has a heel cup, and a leather big toe ring to lock the foot in placeLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable TPU outsole grooved on the back heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
